name: Bardic Inspiration
rechargeSummary: Long rest (short rest at L5 via Font of Inspiration)
scalingSummary: Uses = Charisma modifier (min 1); die size: d6 at L1, d8 at L5, d10 at L10, d12 at L15
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, grant one creature within 60 ft a Bardic Inspiration die. Within 10 minutes, recipient can roll the die and add to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw after seeing the d20 but before the DM says the result.

evidence.pointer: Bard L1: Bardic Inspiration; improvements at L5/L10/L15; featureDescriptions

notes: Multiple subclasses add alternative uses for BI: Cutting Words (Lore), Combat Inspiration (Valor), Mantle of Inspiration (Glamour), etc.

name: Jack of All Trades
mechanicalSummary: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus. Also applies to initiative (Dexterity check).

evidence.pointer: Bard L2: Jack of All Trades; implemented in HeroSheet.tsx with hasJackOfAllTrades

notes: Implemented in app — HeroSheet.tsx applies half proficiency correctly.

name: Song of Rest
scalingSummary: Extra healing die: d6 at L2, d8 at L9, d10 at L13, d12 at L17
mechanicalSummary: During a short rest, any creature that spends Hit Dice regains an extra 1d6 HP (scaling to d12 at higher levels).

evidence.pointer: Bard L2: Song of Rest; improvements; featureDescriptions

name: Expertise (Bard)
scalingSummary: 2 skills at L3, 2 more at L10
mechanicalSummary: Choose two skill proficiencies to double your proficiency bonus. Two additional skills at L10.
notes: App bug SYSTEMIC-2: L10 gives 1 pick instead of 2.

name: Font of Inspiration
rechargeSummary: Changes Bardic Inspiration recharge to short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Bardic Inspiration uses now recharge on a short rest instead of only a long rest.

evidence.pointer: Bard L5: Font of Inspiration; featureDescriptions

name: Countercharm
mechanicalSummary: As an action, begin a performance that lasts until end of next turn. Allies within 30 ft have advantage on saves against being frightened or charmed.

name: Magical Secrets
scalingSummary: 2 spells at L10, 2 at L14, 2 at L18
mechanicalSummary: Learn two spells from any class at levels 10, 14, and 18. These count as bard spells.

name: Superior Inspiration
trigger: When rolling initiative with no Bardic Inspiration uses remaining
mechanicalSummary: Regain one use of Bardic Inspiration when rolling initiative with none left.

name: Cutting Words (College of Lore)
trigger: When a creature within 60 ft makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Subtract BI die roll from the creature's roll
mechanicalSummary: Expend a Bardic Inspiration use as a reaction to subtract the BI die roll from a creature's attack roll, ability check, or damage roll.

name: Peerless Skill (College of Lore)
trigger: When making an ability check (after rolling but before DM result)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Add a Bardic Inspiration die to your own ability check. Can use after seeing the d20 roll.

name: Combat Inspiration (College of Valor)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: A creature with your Bardic Inspiration die can roll it and add to a weapon damage roll, or use its reaction to add the die to its AC against one attack.
notes: Expands BI uses to damage and reactive AC.

name: Battle Magic (College of Valor)
trigger: When using action to cast a bard spell
mechanicalSummary: When you use your action to cast a bard spell, make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

name: Performance of Creation (College of Creation)
rechargeSummary: Long rest (or expend a 2nd+ level spell slot)
scalingSummary: Item size/GP value scales with bard level
mechanicalSummary: As an action, create one nonmagical item within 10 ft. Item value and size scale with bard level. Duration = PB hours.

name: Animating Performance (College of Creation)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As an action, animate a nonmagical item within 30 ft as a Dancing Item for 1 hour. Item can attack (PB + Cha to hit, 1d10 + PB force) and can use your BA to Dash, Disengage, etc.

name: Mantle of Inspiration (College of Glamour)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, expend a BI use to grant up to Charisma modifier creatures within 60 ft temp HP equal to BI die + Cha. Each can use reaction to move up to speed without provoking OAs.

name: Mantle of Majesty (College of Glamour)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, cast command without a spell slot and take on an unearthly appearance for 1 minute (concentration). Can recast command as a bonus action each turn during this time.

name: Unbreakable Majesty (College of Glamour)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, assume a majestic presence for 1 minute. Any creature trying to attack you for the first time each turn makes Charisma save or must choose a new target or waste the attack.

name: Blade Flourish (College of Swords)
trigger: When taking the Attack action and hitting with a weapon attack
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: When hitting with a weapon attack during Attack action, can use a BI die for: Defensive (+die to AC), Slashing (+die damage to target and another within 5 ft), or Mobile (+die damage, push target 5+die ft, follow).
notes: Multiple flourish options with distinct mechanics.

name: Master's Flourish (College of Swords)
mechanicalSummary: When using a Blade Flourish, can roll a d6 instead of expending a Bardic Inspiration die.

name: Psychic Blades (College of Whispers)
trigger: When hitting a creature with a weapon attack (once per round on your turn)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
scalingSummary: Damage: 2d6 at L3, 3d6 at L5, 5d6 at L10, 8d6 at L15
mechanicalSummary: Expend a BI use to deal extra psychic damage on a weapon hit. Scales to 8d6 at L15.

name: Unsettling Words (College of Eloquence)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, expend a BI die and subtract the roll from the next saving throw a creature within 60 ft makes before your next turn.

name: Infectious Inspiration (College of Eloquence)
trigger: When a creature within 60 ft succeeds using one of your Bardic Inspiration dice
resourceCostSummary: Grants a free BI die to another creature
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to give a Bardic Inspiration die (without expending a use) to another creature that can hear you within 60 ft.

name: Tales from Beyond (College of Spirits)
rechargeSummary: Bardic Inspiration recharges on short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action while holding Spiritual Focus, expend a BI use to roll on the Spirit Tales table and produce a random story effect (healing, damage, buff, etc.). Tale can be bestowed as an action or bonus action.
notes: Random effect table — each tale would need its own row for full audit.
